executive_summary: The Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC) has added 29 new entities to the Specially Designated Nationals (SDN) list, primarily targeting individuals and entities involved in Iranian sanctions evasion. The additions include vessels, shipping companies, and individuals with ties to Iran, as well as entities operating in the United Arab Emirates and other countries. No entities were removed or updated on this day.

notable_entities.name: Fleet Tanqo Private Limited
notable_entities.significance: Added to the SDN list for allegedly supporting Iranian sanctions evasion

notable_entities.name: A.C.S. Global BV
notable_entities.significance: Designated as a Specially Designated Global Terrorist (SDGT) for alleged involvement in terrorist activities

notable_entities.name: SHIPZA SHIPPING LIMITED
notable_entities.significance: Added to the SDN list for allegedly supporting Iranian sanctions evasion

risk_implications.description: The addition of several vessels and shipping companies to the SDN list increases the risk of unintentional dealings with sanctioned entities in the maritime shipping sector
The designation of new entities under Iranian sanctions programs may impact trade relationships and require enhanced due diligence for companies operating in the region
The updates to the SDN list may require financial institutions to review and update their customer databases to ensure compliance with OFAC regulations

program_highlights.note: The majority of the new additions were made under the IRAN-EO13902 program, targeting entities involved in Iranian sanctions evasion
A smaller number of entities were designated as Specially Designated Global Terrorists (SDGT) for alleged involvement in terrorist activities

compliance_recommendations: Conduct thorough due diligence on business partners and customers, particularly in high-risk sectors such as maritime shipping and international trade
Regularly review and update customer databases to ensure compliance with OFAC regulations
Implement effective sanctions screening and monitoring processes to detect and prevent transactions with sanctioned entities
